name: mingxin-mcp-server
description: Official Mingxin MCP server (stdio): signed AI-inference-storage benchmarks (KV cache tiering, throughput +29-40%, TTFT -26-32% on AMD MI308X), technical article search, and KV-cache tiering ROI estimation. Every figure carries a test-report citation.
author: Mingxin (Tianjin) Semiconductor Equipment Co., Ltd.
